violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving in Both walk-in-coolers need painted or sealed Osb used as drain board in Bar is not sealed. Cardboard being used as kitchen shelve liner and beer flats storing dressing. Replace cracked sinks in Men's & Women's bathroom.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezer in dishwashing area was not cleaned as frequently as required.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service items were not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Storage room single use items stored on floor.

Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on faucet * as required. Ice sink in bar area does not appear to have a air gap in the plumbing to drain. Black hose in 3-comp sink does not have backflow prevention device installed.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Need another handwashing sink installed in Kitchen area.
Service/janitor's sink. — --Service sink/curbed floor drain was not provided or used for disposal of waste water. Bucket used for draining soda dispensers drains in walk-in-coolers

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean throought facility.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Floor tiles need repaired or replaced throughout kitchen area.
